column1: # World corpus input manifest. One row per Geofabrik PBF.
#   iso2            — ISO-3166-1 alpha-2 (or ad-hoc tag for multi-country dumps like GCC)
#                     butterfly-dl resolves this against the Geofabrik latest
#                     Determined by us, not by Geofabrik.
# Reproducibility primitive: butterfly-dl writes a SHA-256 sidecar
# (<file>.sha256) on every successful download. build.sh refuses to
# consume a PBF whose sidecar is missing. The sidecar is the lock —
# we don't pin URLs (Geofabrik's "latest" mutates monthly).

column4: russia (root snapshot, not under a continent subdir)
israel-and-palestine (PBF shared; tag IL, bbox-classify into IL/PS post-extract)
GCC bundle (SA AE KW BH OM QA); bbox-classify post-extract
